title: Your Sassa payment schedule for 2025
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The South African Social...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The South African Social Security Agency (Sassa) has released the official payment schedule for social grants with payments staggered across three days to ensure smooth processing and minimal congestion at pay points.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The South African Social Security Agency (Sassa) has released the official payment schedule for social grants with payments staggered across three days to ensure smooth processing and minimal congestion at pay points."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"How much will you be paid?"},{"type":"list","items":["Old age: R2 315","War veterans: R2 335","Disability: R2 315","Care dependency: R2 315","Foster child: R1 250","Child support: R560","Grant-in-aid: R560","Social relief of distress (SRD): R370"],"ordered":false},{"type":"blockquote","text":"When will your grant be paid?"},{"type":"list","items":["Older persons: 2 July, 5 August, 2 September, 2 October, 4 November and 2 December.","Disability: 3 July, 6 August, 3 September, 3 October, 5 November and 3 December.","Children’s and all other: 4 July, 7 August, 4 September, 6 October, 6 November and 4 December."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
